assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A creates two tasks for stream 2.2.x. Task 1 (upstream backport) specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] with post-creation action 'Link upstream task to TC-8020 with type "Depend"'. Task 2 (downstream propagation) uses identical labels and post-creation action 'Link downstream task to TC-8020 with type "Depend"'.

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md states 'Case B (cross-stream 2.1.x): Also affected, no CVE Jira exists -- create preemptive remediation tasks'. JQL search 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels = CVE-2026-55123 AND summary ~ "[rhtpa-2.1]"' returned no results. Two preemptive tasks created (upstream backport + downstream propagation for 2.1.x). cross-stream.md confirms 'Since no CVE Jira exists for stream 2.1.x, preemptive remediation tasks are created (Case B)'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 (upstream backport 2.1.x) specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Preemptive Task 2 (downstream propagation 2.1.x) specifies identical labels. cross-stream.md table confirms both tasks carry 'ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md post-creation actions for Preemptive Task 1: 'Link preemptive upstream task to TC-8020 with type "Related" (not "Depend")'. Preemptive Task 2: 'Link preemptive downstream task to TC-8020 with type "Related" (not "Depend")'. cross-stream.md table confirms Link to TC-8020 is 'Related' for both tasks. Section header explicitly states 'Link type: "Related" (not "Depend") to originating CVE Jira TC-8020'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md both preemptive task descriptions begin with: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream. When PSIRT creates one, this task will be linked and the `security-preemptive` label removed.' This prefix explicitly names TC-8020 and stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating CVE. cross-stream.md independently confirms the same prefix text.
